MINI MINUTES: Gerald Woods, Esq. appearing specially for the plaintiff. The case is scheduled for a Jury Trial on 12/13/2010 at 9:30 AM in Department 206 with a Mandatory Settlement Conference. The court ordered the case set for a Mediation compliance hearing set for 9/22/2010 at 10:00 AM in Department 212. Proceedings not reported. (212)
